text: PxWallet god-mode is moving through the 26-phase master plan. Current focus: encrypted local vault + secure cross-chain key derivation (WAX → EVM + Solana). Everything client-side with WharfKit. No backend. No compromises. Pure self-custody.
cta: Follow the full roadmap in our GitBook →

text: PxPackages unification is in progress. @pxjourney/* monorepo with standardized wiring, Hyperion hooks, and beta dApp portals. The goal: every Pixel Journey product feels like one cohesive ecosystem.

The pixel-journey-design-system is our single source of truth for visuals, components, and tone. Retro pixel + glassmorphic + CRT vibes. Every post, every dApp, every graphic should feel like it belongs to the same universe.

The Hot or Not verifiable pairing system uses deterministic client-side parsing of WharfKit broadcast TX hashes + block headers. Provably fair randomness with zero RAM or oracle fees. This is how we do it on WAX.
hooks: How Hot or Not seeds work

text: We build everything with WharfKit now. Session Kit for auth, Contract Kit for interactions, Account Kit for multi-account flows. It's the modern, secure foundation for all Pixel Journey dApps.
cta: See WharfKit in action in PxWallet →
